Metadata.title: Talking Text
Metadata.description: Talking Text - A spoken English practice app for children, where AI only chats within what the child has learned.

Auth.server_error: Server error, please try again later

errors.AUTH_SERVER_ERROR: Server error, please try again later

Parent.welcome_desc: Manage children, learning materials, and progress here.
Parent.report_desc: Words {name} said for the first time in the last 7 days
Parent.report_empty: No new words yet — have a chat with Tina and check back!
Parent.tagline: Talking Text — help your child speak from inside what they've already learned.
Parent.flow_ingest_desc: Snap a photo or paste text — AI extracts words and sentence patterns
Parent.flow_organize_desc: File captured words into the textbook tag tree — AI has pre-sorted them
Parent.flow_organize_badge: {count, plural, one {# bag to organize} other {# bags to organize}}
Parent.flow_chat_desc: Help your child speak within what they've learned

Learners.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
Learners.no_children_hint: No children yet, please add one.
Learners.correction_desc: How the AI handles mistakes during conversation.
Learners.correction_gentle_desc: Only corrects severe errors, today's grammar points, and mistakes repeated within a conversation — one short sentence, never breaking the flow. Best for children.
Learners.correction_strict_desc: Points out every grammar and word-choice error with the corrected sentence, then continues the topic. For serious exam-prep learners.
Learners.correction_native_desc: Everything in Strict, plus suggestions for more idiomatic, native-sounding phrasing.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.welcome: Hello, {name}! Ready to start learning today?
Chat.no_chat: Tap the button below to start speaking.
Chat.no_sessions_yet: No practice yet — start your first chat with Tina!
Chat.no_learners_desc: Please add a child in the parent dashboard first, then start a conversation.
Chat.scope_free_practice: Free practice — calibrating Tina to your level
Chat.text_placeholder: Type a message, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
Chat.session_soft_limit_text: Great practice today! Want to start a new topic?
Chat.session_hard_limit_text: This conversation has reached its maximum length. Please start a new one to continue.
Chat.onboarding_welcome: Hi {name}! I'm Tina, your AI English coach. Let's practice English together today! You can capture/record to import a textbook, or select an existing one. Otherwise, we can start in free practice mode!
Chat.onboarding_free_practice_hint: Type or speak in the box below to start practicing freely ✨

errors.CHAT_AUDIO_EMPTY: No audio captured. Please try again.
errors.CHAT_LEARNER_NOT_FOUND: Child not found. Please refresh and try again.
errors.CHAT_EMPTY_TRANSCRIPTION: Couldn't catch that — please say it again.
errors.CHAT_MIC_DENIED: Microphone access denied. Check your browser permissions.
errors.CHAT_TURN_FAILED: Chat failed. Please try again later.
errors.CHAT_SESSION_HARD_LIMIT: Conversation reached its limit. Please start a new one.

Chat.share_desc: Create a public link so friends and family can see this conversation.
Chat.share_notice: Anyone with the link can read this conversation and play the audio, including your child's voice. No name or other personal information is shown. You can revoke the link at any time.
Chat.share_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Chat.relative_days_ago: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
Chat.relative_weeks_ago: {count, plural, one {# week ago} other {# weeks ago}}
Chat.relative_months_ago: {count, plural, one {# month ago} other {# months ago}}

Materials.title: Materials
Materials.subtitle: All learning materials added to this account. Archive to hide from the scope picker without losing mastery history; delete to remove permanently.
Materials.detail_subtitle: Manage and edit language items and parent-child hierarchy for this material.
Materials.empty_state: No materials yet — open chat and tap the camera to add one.
Materials.confirm_delete: Delete "{name}"? Mastery history for its items is preserved, but the group itself cannot be recovered.
Materials.banner_subtitle: Snap a photo, speak, or type — AI extracts the words, phrases, and patterns. Organize them into textbooks later in the Organize workbench.
Materials.capture_section_hint: Practice right away — no need to file into a textbook first; organize later when it is worth keeping.
Materials.tree_empty_hint: Capture material with smart capture first, then file it into a textbook tag tree in the Organize workbench.
Materials.confirm_large_scope:
This level of the textbook contains a lot of items ({count} in total).
For the best practice experience, the AI teacher will prioritize up to {cap} items your child has not mastered yet.
You can also pick a specific unit or lesson for focused practice.

Continue?
Materials.fork_confirm: Copy "{name}" into your own library? The owner's future updates will no longer sync.
Materials.unsubscribe_confirm: Unsubscribe from "{name}"? Your child's practice history is kept.
Materials.tombstone_text: The owner deleted a book you subscribed to (subscribed {date}).
Materials.add_shared_placeholder: Paste a share link or code
Materials.subscribed_readonly_banner: This book is subscribed from another family — read-only. To edit it, make your own copy from the materials list.
Materials.op_failed_retry: Something went wrong — please try again
Materials.name_required: The material name cannot be empty
Materials.confirm_archive_child: Archive this sub-chapter? You can restore it anytime.
Materials.confirm_delete_permanent: Permanently delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
Materials.assign_learner_subtitle: Choose which children can access "{name}". Assigned children will see it in their library.
Materials.words_section_hint: Enter the core words for this lesson; the AI tutor will drill them and help your child build sentences.
Materials.phrases_section_hint: Enter common collocations and phrasal verbs (e.g. get up, by the way).
Materials.patterns_section_hint: Use underscores to define a pattern and give an anchor so the AI can match it in your child's speech (e.g. I like ___.)
Materials.phrase_placeholder: Enter a phrase (e.g. read a book)
Materials.anchor_placeholder: The fixed start of the pattern, used for matching (e.g. i want to)
Materials.detail_view_hint: View where this material belongs, its learning items, and sub-chapters
Materials.manage_assign_hint: Choose which children can see this material
Materials.unassigned_cannot_see: Not assigned — cannot see this material
Materials.assign_tip: 💡 The child's library updates immediately after assigning. Unassigning hides the material from the child without affecting its content.
Materials.no_learners_hint: Add a child profile in "Manage children" first, then come back to assign materials.
Materials.outline_hint: The core words, phrases, and sentence patterns in this lesson.
Materials.sub_chapters_hint_view: Units and lessons under this chapter. Click to view each one.
Materials.sub_chapters_hint_edit: Manage the units and lessons directly under this folder. Supports inline rename.
Materials.no_children_hint: Type a name below to create one
Materials.no_items_yet: No learning items in this lesson yet
Materials.no_items_hint: Click "Edit material" above or open the item manager to add some
Materials.node_empty_view: No items recorded in this node yet
Materials.node_empty_edit: No items added directly to this node
Materials.node_empty_view_hint: Click "Edit material" above to add some
Materials.node_empty_edit_hint: Add items in the sub-chapters below, or directly here
Materials.container_node_tip: 💡 This chapter holds no items itself — open its sub-chapters for words, phrases, and patterns.
Materials.items_subtitle: The detailed word list and sentence-pattern outline for this material.
Materials.items_edit_subtitle: The item manager for this material — all word, phrase, and pattern edits are saved here together.
Materials.new_child_placeholder: Name for the new child node
Materials.new_name_for_current: + New name for the current node
Materials.select_existing_level: Pick an existing level (click to match)
Materials.no_matching_level: No matching level — saving will create a new one
Materials.tag_path_hint: A chain of tags placing this content in your library, root to leaf, e.g. Tot Talk › Book 1 › Unit 1.
Materials.prompt_notes_label: Extra teaching notes for the AI
Materials.prompt_notes_placeholder: Extra teaching points, e.g. drill the present continuous; focus on correcting /r/ pronunciation.
Materials.share_fallback_title: Share link ready — copy it below

MaterialPickers.kind_placeholder: e.g. Textbook, Unit, Summer camp listening…
MaterialPickers.parent_hint: AI auto-picks the closest existing material as parent; you can search to change it, or create a new one inline.
MaterialPickers.parent_search_placeholder: Search existing or type a new name…
MaterialPickers.parent_no_groups_yet: No materials yet. Type a name to create one as the parent.

Onboarding.title: Add your first child
Onboarding.subtitle: We'll use this to tune Tina's tone and difficulty.
Onboarding.cefr_hint: Pick a CEFR band, or skip — Tina will figure it out from the first chat.
Onboarding.persona_note: You can customize Tina's name and voice later in settings.

errors.ONBOARDING_CREATE_FAILED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Scope.title: Choose practice scope
Scope.free_practice_hint: Chat without a fixed vocab list
Scope.no_groups_yet: No materials yet — tap the camera to add one
Scope.apply_failed: Couldn't switch scope. Please try again.

Ingest.error_mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Check your browser permissions.
Ingest.error_audio_empty: No audio captured. Please try again.
Ingest.error_transcribe_failed: Couldn't transcribe. Try again or type the description.
Ingest.description_placeholder: e.g. Today we learned the colors and clothing words. (Supports Cmd+V to paste copied images directly)
Ingest.section_empty: Nothing here yet — tap Add to enter one manually.
Ingest.low_confidence_hint: {count} item(s) the AI was unsure about — tap Review to inspect them.
Ingest.error_no_input: Add an image or describe what to learn.
Ingest.error_no_items: No language items found. Try a clearer photo.
Ingest.error_save_failed: Couldn't save the group. Please try again.
Ingest.error_scope_failed: Saved, but couldn't switch the chat scope.
Ingest.warning_limit_reached: You can upload up to {max} photos at a time.
Ingest.warning_size_reached: The single or cumulative image size cannot exceed {max}MB.
Ingest.parent_note_badge: Separated from the content by AI
Ingest.parent_note_placeholder: Your notes, requests, or remarks about this material (any language). E.g. "Unit 3 vocab, focus on the r sound." Used only to guide the AI teacher — never treated as learning content.
Ingest.raw_text_placeholder: Fix OCR mistakes in the raw text the vision model extracted...

ShareLanding.not_found_title: This share link is invalid or has been revoked.
ShareLanding.not_found_hint: Ask the sharer for a new link.
ShareLanding.subscribe_desc: No copy is made. When the owner updates the book, you get the updates automatically. Read-only.
ShareLanding.clone_desc: A full copy under your own account, freely editable. The owner's later updates will not sync.
ShareLanding.error_own_group: This is your own book — no need to add it.
ShareLanding.error_adopt_failed: Failed to add the book; please try again.

SharedChat.subtitle: A real conversation with {ai}, the AI English coach
SharedChat.cta_title: Want your child to speak English like this?
SharedChat.cta_desc: Talking Text lets children practice speaking with an AI coach that stays inside what they have learned at school — and gently stretches them one inch at a time.

Organize.title: Organize materials
Organize.subtitle: Each capture is one bag. AI has already guessed which textbook tag it belongs under — confirm or tweak the path, then tap "File the bag".
Organize.error_path_required: Please fill in the filing path first
Organize.discard_confirm: Discard this whole bag of captured material? This cannot be undone.
Organize.no_learner_hint: Please pick an active learner at the top first, then come back to organize.
Organize.existing_structure: Existing textbook structure ({count} paths — reuse tag names as-is)
Organize.inbox_empty: Inbox is empty — everything has been filed 🎉
Organize.path_editor_label: Confirm the filing hierarchy (AI pre-filled — tap a pill to edit; add or remove levels freely)
Organize.autocomplete_header: Pick an existing folder (tap to match)
Organize.raw_draft_placeholder: Edit the captured original English textbook draft here...
Organize.candidates_count: {count, plural, one {# word} other {# words}} (your child said them — not collected yet)
Organize.candidates_path_placeholder: File all into, e.g. Wordbook / New spoken words

TagPath.items_count: {count, plural, one {# learning item} other {# learning items}}
TagPath.depth_badge: {count, plural, one {# level} other {# levels}} total
